prompt:
I need you to draft the SDD for our Procure-to-Pay process. Fit-gap is done. Here are the key requirements:
- FR-P2P-01 (High): Standard PO approval — auto-approve under $5K, manager approval at or above $5K.
- FR-P2P-02 (High): Vendor performance scorecard custom record that tracks on-time delivery % per vendor, updated weekly.
- FR-P2P-03 (Medium): Nightly sync from our legacy ERP (SAP) to update vendor master data in NetSuite.

We're on NetSuite OneWorld.

assertions.description: Output references all three requirement IDs: FR-P2P-01, FR-P2P-02, FR-P2P-03
Document contains all core SDD sections: Requirements Reference, Process Flow, Solution Overview, Records & Fields, Automation & Logic, Roles & Permissions
FR-P2P-02 (scorecard) results in a custom record definition with internal ID format (custrecord_) and key fields listed
FR-P2P-03 (SAP sync) references an Integration Spec ID (INT-SAP-xx or similar) rather than attempting to describe the full integration inline
FR-P2P-01 (PO approval threshold) is correctly solved as SuiteFlow/Workflow or Configuration — not SuiteScript, since simple threshold logic belongs in a workflow
Output includes a completion checklist or open items section (evidence the skill's quality gate was applied)
